top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom a
JOIN bond b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
  AND (a.element = 'P' OR a.element = 'Br');

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
  AND (a.element = 'P' OR a2.element = 'P' OR a.element = 'Br' OR a2.element = 'Br');

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom a
JOIN bond b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
  AND (a.element = 'P' OR a.element = 'Br');

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.atom_id)
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
  AND a.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT a3.molecule_id
    FROM atom a3
    WHERE a3.element IN ('P', 'Br')
  );

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
  AND (a.element = 'P' OR a2.element = 'P' OR a.element = 'Br' OR a2.element = 'Br');

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom a
JOIN bond b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
  AND (a.element = 'P' OR a.element = 'Br');

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.atom_id)
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
  AND a.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT a3.molecule_id
    FROM atom a3
    WHERE a3.element IN ('P', 'Br')
  );

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.atom_id)
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM atom a2
    WHERE a2.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
      AND a2.element IN ('P', 'Br')
  );

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom a
JOIN bond b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
  AND (a.element = 'P' OR a.element = 'Br');
